response.overview: This is the second part of a two episode taboo themed movie. Part one is robot-less, but is available on my other store, POV Pappies, if you want to follow the story. But part two stands alone.  Now obsessed with his step-daughter's bountiful body this POV pappy plots a course for sexual satisfaction. At the end of Part 1 Angel fell resting after seducing her step-father. She came, but he didn't (WTF!) It's the morning after and they meet at the breakfast table, where the tables are turned. Now it's step-dad who must seduce his own lovely step-daughter. Will he be successful? Will he get to bust a nut all over his offspring's beautiful face? The answer is a resounding "Yes!"  With the help of a swinging necklace, that used to belong to her step-mother, step-daddy persuades Angel. Now she will do anything he commands. He plays with her big breasts, fingers her, even gets blown. Without ruining the end, this step-dad ruins his step-daughter's end, when he ravages her tight asshole.
response.title: The Devil In Angel - part 2
